Selected Projects

Renewable Energy

Utility-Scale Solar PV Project

Project Management | Site Execution | Vendor Coordination

Worked on solar PV project execution activities from planning and coordination to installation follow-up and delivery support. Contributed to structured execution across technical, supplier, and on-site workstreams.

  • Supported planning and execution of large solar installation activities.
  • Coordinated with vendors, site teams, and internal stakeholders.
  • Tracked project progress, dependencies, and operational issues.
  • Helped maintain execution quality, timelines, and site readiness.
Commercial Installations

Industrial Rooftop Solar Project

Planning | Resource Coordination | On-Site Delivery

Participated in rooftop solar project activities involving deployment coordination, installation follow-up, and communication across operational teams. Focused on practical execution and project flow.

  • Supported rooftop installation planning and execution tracking.
  • Coordinated site activities with engineering and installation teams.
  • Monitored completion status and resolved execution bottlenecks.
  • Ensured alignment between project scope and field activities.
Operations & Maintenance

Solar Panel Cleaning and O&M Support

Process Understanding | Operations | System Improvement

Exposure to solar operations environments including cleaning systems and maintenance-linked process support. This project highlights understanding of plant performance, uptime, and practical field challenges.

  • Worked around field operations affecting solar system performance.
  • Supported practical maintenance and cleaning-related coordination.
  • Observed efficiency-impacting site conditions and operational dependencies.
  • Contributed to execution-focused problem solving in solar environments.
Electromechanical Systems

BLDC Motor and Rotor System Exposure

Electrical Engineering | Components | Technical Understanding

Built technical understanding around BLDC motor systems and rotor assemblies, strengthening electromechanical fundamentals relevant for engineering, manufacturing, and technical project roles.

  • Worked with BLDC motor-related components and technical concepts.
  • Developed understanding of rotor structure, assembly, and system behavior.
  • Connected electrical engineering knowledge with practical component-level exposure.
  • Strengthened ability to communicate technical topics across project contexts.
Engineering Detail

Rotor Architecture and Component-Level Understanding

Mechanical-Electrical Interface | Technical Curiosity | Product Insight

This project block can be used to visually show hands-on engineering exposure and product-level understanding, especially useful when applying for project roles that value technical depth behind coordination work.

  • Showcases component-level familiarity in electromechanical systems.
  • Supports your profile as a project professional with engineering grounding.
  • Useful for roles bridging technical teams and business/project stakeholders.
  • Strengthens portfolio credibility beyond pure documentation or planning work.
